Package io.github.michaelcirkl.ubsa

package io.github.michaelcirkl.ubsa
  • Class
    Description
    Blob
    Provider-neutral representation of a blob/object and its associated metadata.
    Blob.Builder
     
    BlobStorageAsyncClient
    Asynchronous provider-neutral client for bucket and blob operations.
    BlobStorageClientFactory
    Factory for adapting provider SDK clients to the UBSA sync or async interfaces.
    BlobStorageSyncClient
    Synchronous provider-neutral client for bucket and blob operations.
    Bucket
    Provider-neutral representation of bucket/container metadata.
    Bucket.Builder
